name: AI Content Factory — Automated Media Engine
description: Scrape trending topics, generate content with LLM, publish across platforms, track engagement.

steps.prompt: Generate 3 high-quality blog post outlines for these trending topics: {{_prev}}. Format as JSON array with title, hook, sections[].
steps.label: Generate content outlines

steps.name: article_1
steps.prompt: Write a 600-word SEO article for the first topic outline: {{_prev}}

steps.name: article_2
steps.prompt: Write social media captions (LinkedIn, Twitter, TikTok) for the first topic: {{_prev}}

steps.message: Content factory run complete. New content queued for publishing.
steps.label: Notify content team
